inputs.label: Current Weight
inputs.businessContext: The fighter's weight before cutting, in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: The fighter's weight before cutting, in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sporcunun kesim öncesi ağırlığı, kilogram cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Gewicht des Kämpfers vor der Gewichtsreduktion in Kilogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids du combattant avant la coupe, en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: El peso del luchador antes del corte, en kilogramos.

inputs.label: Target Fight Weight
inputs.businessContext: The target weight to make, in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: The target weight to make, in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ulaşılması gereken hedef ağırlık, kilogram cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Zielgewicht in Kilogramm, das erreicht werden muss.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids cible à atteindre, en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso objetivo a alcanzar, en kilogramos.

inputs.label: Max Dehydration %
inputs.businessContext: Maximum safe dehydration as percentage of current body weight (5% is common extreme).

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum safe dehydration as percentage of current body weight (5% is common extreme).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut vücut ağırlığının yüzdesi olarak maksimum güvenli dehidrasyon (%5 yaygın uç noktadır).
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale sichere Dehydrierung als Prozentsatz des aktuellen Körpergewichts (5 % ist üblich extrem).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Déshydratation maximale sécuritaire en pourcentage du poids corporel actuel (5% est un extrême courant).
businessContext_i18n.es: Deshidratación máxima segura como porcentaje del peso corporal actual (5% es un extremo común).

inputs.label: Days Until Weigh-in
inputs.businessContext: Number of days until the official weigh-in.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days until the official weigh-in.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage bis zum offiziellen Wiegen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours avant la pesée officielle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de días hasta el pesaje oficial.
